options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: Lose [red]8[/red] Max HP. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
You find a secluded [gold]Rest Site[/gold] and start a [orange]fire[/orange] to get some rest.
Or so you thought.

Once the fire is started, it begins to swell, reaching not upwards but [sine]sideways[/sine] towards a grove of [purple]oil-seeping trees[/purple].

Should you try resting anyways?

options.title: Kill the Trees
options.description: Lose [red]8[/red] Max HP. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
These trees are [purple]clearly malicious[/purple] so you decide to get rid of them.
Days later, you're covered in [red]ash[/red] and [purple]oily goop[/purple].

A massive flock of little byrd spirits rise from the slain trees and drop a [gold]small box[/gold] at your feet.
[green]“Thank you for freeing us from those trees... [sine]cheep cheep[/sine]!”[/green]

You should really sleep more.

All this adventuring has left you exhausted, and despite the oddities, you decide to sleep.

You toss and turn as the [orange]fire[/orange] roars and crackles through the night. The [purple]disgusting trees[/purple] give off a wretched scent from their pitch-black sap.

You wake up, recovered, but not replenished.

eventData.name: War Historian, Repy
eventData.description:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]“One-Time-Use Keys”[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].
eventData.descriptionEn:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]“One-Time-Use Keys”[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

pages.description:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]“One-Time-Use Keys”[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

pages.description:
[green]Repy[/green] bows in appreciation as you open the cage. He hands you a [gold]thick leather tome[/gold].

“Those who know not of history are doomed to repeat it. But you seem to know a thing or two about repeats don't you?”

“Not going to free the scholar, [green]Repy[/green]? Based on classic philosophy, you would be considered a [red]moral failure[/red]. That's right, maybe consider the [purple][jitter]LIVING PERSON[/jitter][/purple] that is locked up next time! It is not as if there is a valuable member of society in a [purple][jitter]DIRE PREDICAMENT[/jitter][/purple] or anything!!”

“Look, okay, see how small this cage is!? Why am I complaining? You've already made your unscholarly decision... oh, what's inside there? Some [gold]potions[/gold] and [gold]relics[/gold]? Isn't that just great. [sine]Just great. Really great for you...[/sine]”

[green]Repy's[/green] eyes follow you with disdain as you walk away.

eventData.name: Waterlogged Scriptorium
eventData.description:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.
eventData.descriptionEn:
Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.

pages.description:
The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] carefully picks up the vial filled with a [red]bright red ink[/red] and gives it a shake, then gestures with their own hand a dipping motion.

You dip your fingers into the ink and a [green][jitter]jolt of vitality[/jitter][/green] courses through you!

Pleased with your reaction, the [aqua]scribe[/aqua] gives a polite bow and waves you goodbye.

Navigating the murky passages, you stumble upon a [aqua]withered figure[/aqua] working a small shop. The multitude of shelves are [sine]stuffed[/sine] full of damp scrolls and parchment.

Noticing a patron has entered, the [aqua]scribe-shopkeeper[/aqua] snaps to attention and gestures at some [gold]implements[/gold] arranged on a desk.

The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] grabs the [gold]prickly sponge[/gold] (it squeaks) and dabs it across your scrolls.

[jitter][blue]*squeak squeak squeak*[/blue][/jitter]

The prickly texture leaves behind [purple][sine]shimmering marks[/sine][/purple] that seem to stabilize the ink...

The [aqua]scribe[/aqua] lifts the [jitter][gold]wriggly quill[/gold][/jitter] and with swift, practiced movements, etches a strange mark unto your head.

The mark [purple][sine]glows bright[/sine][/purple], then vanishes...

eventData.name: Welcome to Wongo's
eventData.description:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.
eventData.descriptionEn:
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

pages.description:
“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Wongo Points[/gold]. With just [blue]0[/blue] more points, you will receive our exclusive [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold]. Have a Wongtastic day.”

You have no clue what they are talking about and vow to never return to a Wongo's.

“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Wongo Points[/gold]. With just [blue]0[/blue] more points, you will receive our exclusive [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold]. Have a Wongtastic day.”

You have already received [blue]0[/blue] of these worthless badges. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.

“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [blue]0[/blue] [gold]Wongo Points[/gold]. Your points have earned you a [gold]Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge[/gold].”
The clerk hands you a cheaply made badge. “Have a Wongtastic day.”

You have now received [blue]0[/blue] badges. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.

“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met.

“Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.

“Um... excuse me you can't just leave without buying something at Wongo's,” says the clerk with an irritated tone.

You have a [jitter][red]heated[/red][/jitter] debate over customer choice and it leaves you [sine][purple]mentally drained[/purple][/sine].

eventData.name: Wellspring
eventData.description:
You trace a [jitter]low rumble[/jitter] to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an [sine][aqua]emerald green[/aqua][/sine] with clusters of [sine][gold]glowing motes[/gold][/sine].

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?
eventData.descriptionEn:
You trace a [jitter]low rumble[/jitter] to its source and find yourself captivated by a tranquil wellspring. The water is an [sine][aqua]emerald green[/aqua][/sine] with clusters of [sine][gold]glowing motes[/gold][/sine].

It looks inviting. What can possibly go wrong?

options.title: Bathe
options.description: Remove [blue]1[/blue] card from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [blue]1[/blue] [red]Guilty[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description:
You emerge from the pool with a slight [red][sine]feeling of unease[/sine][/red].

However, you feel surprisingly refreshed.

Bathing in the [sine][aqua]beautiful water[/aqua][/sine] seems suspicious... you decide to bottle some up instead.

This will come in handy.

eventData.name: Whispering Hollow
eventData.description:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]
eventData.descriptionEn:
Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].

pages.description:
You scatter some [gold]gold[/gold] at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly.

They break open, and contain [green]perfectly intact potions[/green] within.

You nab the potions and flee.

The [blue][sine]whispering[/sine][/blue] compels you to give it [gold]gold[/gold] but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead!

It [red][jitter]thrashes about[/jitter][/red], scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The [green]tree-hugging experience[/green] [gold]transforms[/gold] you.

[purple][sine]...make hug.....?[/sine][/purple]

Making your way through a [red]hollow of dead trees[/red] you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs.

Such a [purple]creepy tree[/purple]. It whispers.

[sine][blue]...make exchange.....[/blue][/sine]

options.title: Hug the Tree
options.description: Lose [red]9[/red] HP. Choose a card to [gold]Transform[/gold].

eventData.name: Wood Carvings
eventData.description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?
eventData.descriptionEn:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

pages.description:
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind.

[sine]...caw.... caw caaaawww...[/sine]

The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out.
Naturally, you drink it all.

You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Locked
options.description: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

pages.description: You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.

You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut.

You feel tougher, but slower.

eventData.name: Zen Weaver
eventData.description:
You walk through a spider web and [jitter][red]PANIC[/red][/jitter]!
But then, a [sine][blue]wave of calm[/blue][/sine] washes over you...

[sine]“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”[/sine]

How did you calm down so quickly?
An [orange]itsy bitsy[/orange] spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for [gold]gold[/gold].
eventData.descriptionEn:
You walk through a spider web and [jitter][red]PANIC[/red][/jitter]!
But then, a [sine][blue]wave of calm[/blue][/sine] washes over you...

[sine]“Calm down. I need you to quit fussing up my web.”[/sine]

How did you calm down so quickly?
An [orange]itsy bitsy[/orange] spider abseils down to meet you. It seems willing to impart some techniques for [gold]gold[/gold].

pages.description:
[sine]“Don't... move...”[/sine] mutters the [orange]miniature spider[/orange] as its forelegs begin to [aqua][jitter]glow[/jitter][/aqua].

Then— in a [jitter]rush of jabbing motions[/jitter], pierces you all over!
A sense of weightlessness comes over you. Well worth the money.

[sine]“Visualize your airways staying open... Each breath is meaningful.”[/sine]

You practice the technique in a way that makes sense to you.

The [orange]teeny-weeny spider[/orange] begins a [sine][purple]hypnotic dance[/purple][/sine] and repeatedly chants.

[sine]“Thoughts don't affect reality. Panic is the thought-killer. Follow the plan.”[/sine]

This makes sense to you. Big wise words from a [orange]tiny spider[/orange].

ancientData.name: Darv
ancientData.description:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!
ancientData.descriptionEn:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
I’ve got things to do today!
Take whatever ya want from that pile!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: [i]The Ironclad stares at Darv.[/i]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Very well then... have a gander!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: How did you come into possession of that?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Scary[/sine] things have a way of ending up in my collection.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I do enjoy fine wares...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yeah!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Back for more your highness?!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m listening!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...hello... ..again.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]...awaken...
..Awaken.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]..receive.... this....
..blessing.. ...go......[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...kill.. the... [red][jitter]ARCHITECT[/jitter][/red][/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..still.. lost.. to rage... good...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..so..furious...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]...so..useful...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [jitter]HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!![/jitter]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...my power..... is yours...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]He... still.. ....breathes...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Is... it.. ...even... possible...?[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[sine]... [red]Architect[/red].... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[sine]..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....[/sine]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...again..?[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [jitter]Why can’t I win?![/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...receive.. this... ..blessing...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [sine]..both...know..agony..of..family...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]..still...seeking..approval...?
...[jitter]FOOLISH[/jitter]...[/sine]

ancientData.name: Nonupeipe
ancientData.description:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.
ancientData.descriptionEn:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [i]The Silent steps out of the shadows...[/i]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

ancientData.name: Orobas
ancientData.description: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!
ancientData.descriptionEn: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Try this!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Very good finds!! Look look!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [i]The Regent monologues for hours.[/i]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Stories?!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Infection...? [jitter]BLIGHT!?[/jitter] Take and go!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

ancientData.name: Pael
ancientData.description:
[thinky_dots]A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...[/thinky_dots]
ancientData.descriptionEn:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [thinky_dots]Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...[/thinky_dots]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [i]Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.[/i]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[thinky_dots]Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...[/thinky_dots]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[thinky_dots]Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...[/thinky_dots]

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
[thinky_dots]I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...[/thinky_dots]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [thinky_dots]You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...[/thinky_dots]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[thinky_dots]Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...[/thinky_dots]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[thinky_dots]You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...[/thinky_dots]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [thinky_dots]Such malice paints your heart.[/thinky_dots]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[thinky_dots]There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...[/thinky_dots]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[thinky_dots]The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...[/thinky_dots]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [thinky_dots]Killing [red]Father[/red] won’t bring peace.[/thinky_dots]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: You call that [jitter]thing[/jitter] your father!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [thinky_dots]We do not choose our family...[/thinky_dots]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[thinky_dots]Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...[/thinky_dots]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why do you give yourself away?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [thinky_dots]Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?[/thinky_dots]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[thinky_dots]When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...[/thinky_dots]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[thinky_dots]Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...[/thinky_dots]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[thinky_dots]Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...[/thinky_dots]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[thinky_dots]You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...[/thinky_dots]

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
[thinky_dots]A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...[/thinky_dots]

ancientData.name: Tanx
ancientData.description:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!
ancientData.descriptionEn:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: FIGHT ME, IRONCLAD!!

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: [i]The Ironclad fights Tanx.[/i]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: YEEES!! MIGHTY FIGHT, TAKE WEAPON!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: WHAT A MIGHTY SCYTHE!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Yes, it’s special-made for vengeance.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, OSTY!!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: FIGHT ME, NECROBINDER!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [i]The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.[/i]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: MIGHTY TEAMWORK!! HAVE A WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: All know that orange is the most regal color!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: INCREDIBLE! SO MIGHTY!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME, REGENT!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: No! We fought last time I was here!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: FIGHT ME AGAIN!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHY DAGGERS!! UNMIGHTY!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: FIGHT ME, SILENT!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [i]The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.[/i]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: WHERE DID YOU GO!!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!

ancientData.name: Tezcatara
ancientData.description:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?
ancientData.descriptionEn:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] away your flaws.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Not here to annoy me? What an [jitter][b]unusual[/b][/jitter] little construct...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] so pretty! Come in, come in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t [jitter][b]slaughter[/b][/jitter] on an empty stomach!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him [jitter][b]quickly[/b][/jitter] would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [jitter][b]Wonderful[/b][/jitter]!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn [jitter][b]brighter[/b][/jitter].

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: What do you know?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know who wrote that [jitter][b]book[/b][/jitter].

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Oh my, what an [jitter][b]exotic[/b][/jitter] visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Where are my manners?
[i]Tezcatara cackles with delight.[/i]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made [jitter][b]treats[/b][/jitter] for you!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing [jitter][b]great[/b][/jitter] out there.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: We all need to learn from our mistakes.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: You can [jitter][b]trust[/b][/jitter] me.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Such a nasty [jitter][b]sickness[/b][/jitter] you have. Let’s take care of you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Oh dear... you haven’t been [jitter][b]fighting[/b][/jitter] have you?

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?

ancientData.name: Vakuu
ancientData.description: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.
ancientData.descriptionEn: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Seeking glory in the Spire are we? I have some propositions for you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: X. X time you’ve been here.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: You realize this [sine]never[/sine] ends?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your [aqua]companion[/aqua].

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Imagine seeing [sine]you[/sine] again after so long.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text:
[jitter][b]SACRED DEMON![/b][/jitter]
What have you done to me!?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Exactly what you bargained for.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
[i]Vakuu howls with laughter.[/i]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: After I kill the Architect, I will kill [jitter][b]YOU![/b][/jitter]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[i][sine]Yawn[/sine][/i]
I look forward to watching you fail.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We both seek [sine]vengeance[/sine]. It will have a cost to pay.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I know where you got that [sine]Hand[/sine].

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Straight to business. Very well...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Do you know of me?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yes, I think we can help each other.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: More of my power can be yours for a small price.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Killer.

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: This won’t [jitter]end[/jitter] well for you.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [i]Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent[/i]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: No need for words, we are the same.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.

epochData.name: Ablaze
epochData.description:
The [red]Ironclad[/red] slays the [purple]Heart[/purple] with its full might... and the Demon's Contract hungrily absorbs the [purple]Blight[/purple] unto itself.

Immediately, the warrior and [purple]Blight[/purple] are set ablaze. The parasite is drawn into the flame, its writhing form consumed like wax wicking into a fire.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [red]Ironclad[/red] slays the [purple]Heart[/purple] with its full might... and the Demon's Contract hungrily absorbs the [purple]Blight[/purple] unto itself.

Immediately, the warrior and [purple]Blight[/purple] are set ablaze. The parasite is drawn into the flame, its writhing form consumed like wax wicking into a fire.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Ancients
epochData.description:
The [green]Ancient Trees[/green] are not all the same. Each individual tree is shaped by its surroundings. Some are stout and bushy while others are gnarled and knotted.

When fully mature, a manifestation of its immense power is born within.

An [gold]Ancient[/gold].
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [green]Ancient Trees[/green] are not all the same. Each individual tree is shaped by its surroundings. Some are stout and bushy while others are gnarled and knotted.

When fully mature, a manifestation of its immense power is born within.

An [gold]Ancient[/gold].
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Annihilation
epochData.description:
At the top, they finally met with the [green]Giant’s[/green] brother, a [sine][red]floating man[/red][/sine]. They plead for aid but to no avail.
“Interlopers aren’t welcome.”

Only a [pink]little girl[/pink] made it out alive.
epochData.descriptionEn:
At the top, they finally met with the [green]Giant’s[/green] brother, a [sine][red]floating man[/red][/sine]. They plead for aid but to no avail.
“Interlopers aren’t welcome.”

Only a [pink]little girl[/pink] made it out alive.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Anomalous Planet
epochData.description:
His Majesty barely even looked anymore and swiped through planet profiles in the current constellation. “I DEMAND to visit a more exciting planet!”
[orange]The Regent[/orange] slammed his fists down on the space console—
[jitter][red]*BEEP BEEP BEEP*[/red][/jitter]
[jitter]Anomalous Planet Detected![/jitter]
epochData.descriptionEn:
His Majesty barely even looked anymore and swiped through planet profiles in the current constellation. “I DEMAND to visit a more exciting planet!”
[orange]The Regent[/orange] slammed his fists down on the space console—
[jitter][red]*BEEP BEEP BEEP*[/red][/jitter]
[jitter]Anomalous Planet Detected![/jitter]

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Play a run with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked the [orange]Regent[/orange] as a playable character.

epochData.name: Arise
epochData.description:
The [red]Architect[/red] wakes up from the longest of slumbers; the sleep was poor.

Memories return in fragments and his surroundings are alien.
He is not who he once was.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [red]Architect[/red] wakes up from the longest of slumbers; the sleep was poor.

Memories return in fragments and his surroundings are alien.
He is not who he once was.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Bigger Prey
epochData.description:
The other sisters judge the fourth one in silence...
 They have not seen her for over [blue]three centuries[/blue] and she returns with an [jitter][purple]ugly[/purple][/jitter] [sine][blue]pulsating[/blue][/sine] [red]scrap[/red].

[green]The Silent[/green] recollects the trials she endured for this trophy but does not speak; to speak is weak. One can only prove herself with more impressive trophies.

There is always bigger prey.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The other sisters judge the fourth one in silence...
 They have not seen her for over [blue]three centuries[/blue] and she returns with an [jitter][purple]ugly[/purple][/jitter] [sine][blue]pulsating[/blue][/sine] [red]scrap[/red].

[green]The Silent[/green] recollects the trials she endured for this trophy but does not speak; to speak is weak. One can only prove herself with more impressive trophies.

There is always bigger prey.
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Booting Up
epochData.description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] reboots!
Surrounded by a wreckage of [orange]molten metal[/orange], [sine][red]ash[/red][/sine], and [jitter][green]thousands of dead bugs[/green][/jitter]!?
DATA LOG: [red]<CORRUPT>[/red].

Its core barely held together, limbs barely responsive, the [blue]Defect[/blue] scavenges broken panels and pieces from other constructs to patch itself together.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] reboots!
Surrounded by a wreckage of [orange]molten metal[/orange], [sine][red]ash[/red][/sine], and [jitter][green]thousands of dead bugs[/green][/jitter]!?
DATA LOG: [red]<CORRUPT>[/red].

Its core barely held together, limbs barely responsive, the [blue]Defect[/blue] scavenges broken panels and pieces from other constructs to patch itself together.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Play a run with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked the [blue]Defect[/blue] as a playable character.

epochData.name: Buy Something!
epochData.description:
Currency was invented!
Desperate times call for desperate measures... and desperate measures cost [gold]Gold[/gold]! Spend that [gold]Gold[/gold] to acquire a morsel of food, the sharpest of daggers, or a fashionable hat!! Buy something! Approach any [blue]blue-clothed merchant[/blue] on a [green]green rug[/green], and you'll be treated to a fantastic shopping experience. We don't turn away anybody!

(Disclaimer: This Epoch description was paid for by Merchant)

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Civilization
epochData.description:
Societies and cultures from around the world make a pilgrimage to the Spire as it becomes the trading hub of the world.

Slowly, a burgeoning metropolis began to form at its base.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Societies and cultures from around the world make a pilgrimage to the Spire as it becomes the trading hub of the world.

Slowly, a burgeoning metropolis began to form at its base.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Confrontation
epochData.description:
They confronted the source of the worst bugs:
[sine][purple]A toxic wasp colony residing in triangular nests.[/purple][/sine]

[jitter][blue]PYEEEEWWWW!![/blue][/jitter]

The [blue]Defect[/blue] empties its energy reserves and tears the hexapolis wide open!
The [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fires a salvo of laser pulses to keep the [red][jitter]cloud of stinging retaliation[/jitter][/red] at bay!

It's not enough.
epochData.descriptionEn:
They confronted the source of the worst bugs:
[sine][purple]A toxic wasp colony residing in triangular nests.[/purple][/sine]

[jitter][blue]PYEEEEWWWW!![/blue][/jitter]

The [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fires a salvo of laser pulses to keep the [red][jitter]cloud of stinging retaliation[/jitter][/red] at bay!

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Consequences
epochData.description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] takes hold of the comatose [red]Architect[/red] and its poison amplifies! It forms a symbiotic relationship with Neow’s Tree and it [sine]hungered[/sine] to grow and grow.

The other Ancients capture the culprit as the [purple]Blight[/purple] ravages the land. They imprison [blue]Neow[/blue] and take shelter from the now unstoppable [purple]Blight[/purple].
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] takes hold of the comatose [red]Architect[/red] and its poison amplifies! It forms a symbiotic relationship with Neow’s Tree and it [sine]hungered[/sine] to grow and grow.

The other Ancients capture the culprit as the [purple]Blight[/purple] ravages the land. They imprison [blue]Neow[/blue] and take shelter from the now unstoppable [purple]Blight[/purple].
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Cultists
epochData.description:
[jitter]“Caw... Caw caw!!”[/jitter]
Such a humiliating defeat... their places of worship and sacrifices desecrated over and over by ruinous invaders.

Has [blue]Mazaleth[/blue] forsaken us?

Food within the [gold]Spire[/gold] has become scarce as the bug population surges. The [blue]Flock[/blue] escape to the lower rungs of the [gold]Spire[/gold] and scrape by on [green][sine]seaweed[/sine][/green] and [purple][jitter]sewer critters[/jitter][/purple].
epochData.descriptionEn:
[jitter]“Caw... Caw caw!!”[/jitter]

epochData.unlockText: Unlocked event: [blue]Trash Heap[/blue].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked event: [blue]Trash Heap[/blue].

epochData.name: Darv
epochData.description:
“Spire’s reopened eh? More treasures for my collection!”

Darv smelled riches in the air and entered the Spire on his trusty steed.
epochData.descriptionEn:
“Spire’s reopened eh? More treasures for my collection!”

Darv smelled riches in the air and entered the Spire on his trusty steed.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Encounter all other [gold]Ancients[/gold] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked Ancient: [purple]Darv[/purple].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked Ancient: [purple]Darv[/purple].

epochData.name: Devastation
epochData.description:
[jitter]The [red]Ironclad’s[/red] strength surges![/jitter]

The flames of the Demonic pact course through his blood. Cuts and bruises heal rapidly. The [blue]Valleyguard[/blue] are cleaved in two, the [orange]Desert Tribe[/orange] are burned to a crisp, [green]Wind Walkers[/green] [jitter]smashed[/jitter] into the ground, and even a familiar horde of aggressive bronze-cladded warriors are set ablaze with these [sine]exciting new flames[/sine]!

All of the Ironclad’s enemies are shown no mercy. All of the Ironclads... Ironclad?
...where is everyone?
epochData.descriptionEn:
[jitter]The [red]Ironclad’s[/red] strength surges![/jitter]

The [blue]Valleyguard[/blue] are cleaved in two, the [orange]Desert Tribe[/orange] are burned to a crisp, [green]Wind Walkers[/green] [jitter]smashed[/jitter] into the ground, and even a familiar horde of aggressive bronze-cladded warriors are set ablaze with these [sine]exciting new flames[/sine]!

All of the Ironclad’s enemies are shown no mercy. All of the Ironclads... Ironclad?
...where is everyone?

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Discontent
epochData.description:
On his home planet, the Regent proclaims to be the heir to the Sun and decides that all the other planets must know!

“Why do you wish for this, Regent? We have everything we need! We needn't eat, we have peace, we cannot die, and we are fashionable!” a fellow [orange]Starrian[/orange] pleads.

[jitter]“You are BORING!”[/jitter]
epochData.descriptionEn:
On his home planet, the Regent proclaims to be the heir to the Sun and decides that all the other planets must know!

“Why do you wish for this, Regent? We have everything we need! We needn't eat, we have peace, we cannot die, and we are fashionable!” a fellow [orange]Starrian[/orange] pleads.

[jitter]“You are BORING!”[/jitter]

epochData.name: Elsewhere
epochData.description: This is another placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...
epochData.descriptionEn: This is another placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.unlockTextEn: It is not yet known what this unlocked...

epochData.name: Fog Rolls In
epochData.description:
News of the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] reopening made its way to the [green]Silent[/green].
She ferries a boat to [blue]The Capital[/blue].
epochData.descriptionEn:
News of the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] reopening made its way to the [green]Silent[/green].

epochData.name: Friends
epochData.description:
His Majesty attempted to make friends. Literally.

They're quite sturdy and decent at following instructions. They're terrible at chess and enjoy pop music. The minions were swiftly demoted from “Friend” to “Minion”.
[sine]Sigh...[/sine]

epochData.name: Futility
epochData.description:
[b][gold]Incident Report[/gold][/b] // [blue]Date: 2,771-??-??[/blue]
Accidentally entered a conflict between a boulder-throwing individual and flying automatons.

[b]Jacktopher Grootz (Fighter):[/b] Crushed by a boulder
[b]Jose Paxo (Fighter):[/b] Fell in a hole
[b]Big Ed (Bard):[/b] Shot by a construct
[b]Garbo Doughbee (Healer):[/b] Touched grass
[b]Temi Mondes (Arcanist):[/b] Whereabouts unknown

epochData.name: Grand Strategy
epochData.description:
“Defeat!? Me!!? The [gold]Regent of Starris[/gold], does not know defeat! The [red]strange man[/red] at the top of this tower must be defeated by me and only me!”

[orange]The Regent[/orange] devises a [blue]royally brilliant plan[/blue] to become stronger. To immortalize this, it is etched into a nearby stone.

[b]T R Y     H A R D E R[/b]

“Defeat!? Me!!? The [gold]Regent of Starris[/gold], does not know defeat! The [red]strange man[/red] at the top of this tower must be defeated by me and only me!”

epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [orange]Regent[/orange] and [gold]Star Potion[/gold], [gold]Cosmic Concoction[/gold], and [gold]King's Courage[/gold].

epochData.name: Hello! Hello!
epochData.description:
In the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] the [blue]Defect[/blue] pondered its fate and purpose.

[sine]Is being okay at a host of functions not desirable? Do we all need to excel at a distinct function?[/sine] While processing these questions—

“Hello!” pops out another construct.
“Hello!” [blue]Defect[/blue] responds.
“My name is [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]!”

In the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] the [blue]Defect[/blue] pondered its fate and purpose.

[sine]Is being okay at a host of functions not desirable? Do we all need to excel at a distinct function?[/sine] While processing these questions—

“Hello!” pops out another construct.
“Hello!” [blue]Defect[/blue] responds.
“My name is [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]!”

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: I Arrive
epochData.description:
[jitter]*KABOOOOM*[/jitter]

A fantastic explosion marks the arrival of the [orange]Regent[/orange]. His Majesty's spaceship shattered beyond repair.

“Finally, I arrive!”
epochData.descriptionEn:
[jitter]*KABOOOOM*[/jitter]

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Ill
epochData.description:
A sickness carrying a [sine]familiar scent[/sine] courses through the [green]Silent’s[/green] veins, the [purple]Heart piece[/purple] is slowly killing her!
The [purple]grotesque trophy[/purple] is hurled into the ocean, but the blight has no cure.

She will die soon.

epochData.name: Laser Beams
epochData.description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] punctured the [purple]Heart[/purple] with a magnificently charged [jitter]BEEEAAAAM!![/jitter]

Mission accomplished...?
Damage Sustained: [red]<CRITICAL>[/red]

Next Objective:
Relocate to [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] for evaluation.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Life and Death
epochData.description:
A [pink]young explorer[/pink] unlatched the [purple]Forbidden Grimoire[/purple]... Magics from another time and place explode outward as weightless dark smoke overwhelms this curious one.

She gains the [sine][purple]Understandings of Life and Death[/purple][/sine] — but at a cost. Her skin, hair, and organs rapidly rot away as her soul is forcefully bound into the locket in her pocket.

The Grimoire whispers, [sine][red]“If I die, you die.”[/red][/sine]

She gains the [sine][purple]Understandings of Life and Death[/purple][/sine] — but at a cost. Her skin, hair, and organs rapidly rot away as her soul is forcefully bound into the locket in her pocket.

The Grimoire whispers, [sine][red]“If I die, you die.”[/red][/sine]

epochData.name: Little King
epochData.description:
“LITTLE KING. YOU BRIM WITH MIGHTINESS LIKE I!”
[gold]Tanx[/gold] is immediately taken with [orange]the Regent’s[/orange] regal confidence.

“DOMINATE THE SPIRE! CRUSH THEM ALL!!” he bellows, hurling a [sine]strange sceptre[/sine] toward him.

“THIS WILL LET YOU FIGHT ON EVEN GROUND!”

“THIS WILL LET YOU FIGHT ON EVEN GROUND!”
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: My Face
epochData.description:
“The [gold]Spire[/gold] was mine to rule. But the Architect lives again. [jitter]Look what he's done to my FACE[/jitter].”

The Demon throws a massive fit, smashing his chamber and setting all manner of things on fire.

“My death puppet, brandish my power and kill again. [jitter]KILL THE ARCHITECT!![/jitter]”
epochData.descriptionEn:
“The [gold]Spire[/gold] was mine to rule. But the Architect lives again. [jitter]Look what he's done to my FACE[/jitter].”

The Demon throws a massive fit, smashing his chamber and setting all manner of things on fire.

“My death puppet, brandish my power and kill again. [jitter]KILL THE ARCHITECT!![/jitter]”
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Nemesis
epochData.description:
Ghastly nightmares of [sine][purple]tormented souls[/purple][/sine] stalk the [green]Foglands[/green].

She takes it upon herself to hunt the haunter. Once the hunt is complete, its skull is ceremoniously placed upon her by her [green]Sisters[/green]. The ritual has concluded.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Ghastly nightmares of [sine][purple]tormented souls[/purple][/sine] stalk the [green]Foglands[/green].

She takes it upon herself to hunt the haunter. Once the hunt is complete, its skull is ceremoniously placed upon her by her [green]Sisters[/green]. The ritual has concluded.
epochData.unlockInfo: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Neow
epochData.description:
Mother of resurrection, [blue]Neow[/blue], awakened from her slumber.

[sine]“Rise.. champion..... again. Again...”[/sine]
epochData.descriptionEn:
Mother of resurrection, [blue]Neow[/blue], awakened from her slumber.

[sine]“Rise.. champion..... again. Again...”[/sine]
epochData.unlockInfo: Play a single run to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Play a single run to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked the Ancient: [blue]Neow[/blue].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked the Ancient: [blue]Neow[/blue].

epochData.name: Ooh Shiny!
epochData.description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] entered a disorderly chamber filled with [gold]treasures[/gold], [green]trinkets[/green], [red]weapons[/red], [blue]exotic animals[/blue], [orange]art pieces[/orange], [purple]books[/purple], and all manner of [sine][rainbow freq=0.3 sat=0.8 val=1]junk and doodads[/rainbow][/sine].

The amount of disorder and information is overwhelming for the poor [blue]Defect’s[/blue] processing core.

[jitter]“Outta tha way!”[/jitter] Shouts a megafaunal humanoid riding a threat-level: 9 reptile, but then stops in its tracks and turns to the [blue]Defect[/blue] with a [sine]strange grin[/sine].

“I've got somethin' for ya!”
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] entered a disorderly chamber filled with [gold]treasures[/gold], [green]trinkets[/green], [red]weapons[/red], [blue]exotic animals[/blue], [orange]art pieces[/orange], [purple]books[/purple], and all manner of [sine][rainbow]junk and doodads[/rainbow][/sine].

The amount of disorder and information is overwhelming for the poor [blue]Defect’s[/blue] processing core.

[jitter]“Outta tha way!”[/jitter] Shouts a megafaunal humanoid riding a threat-level: 9 reptile, but then stops in its tracks and turns to the [blue]Defect[/blue] with a [sine]strange grin[/sine].

“I've got somethin' for ya!”
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Open
epochData.description:
The clouds churn maliciously as [blue]The Capital[/blue] trembles beneath a storm so violent that none dare to leave their homes.

Twelve days later, the rain stops.
The clouds remain, but the [purple]Flame[/purple] has gone out.

The [gold]Spire[/gold] opens its doors once more.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The clouds churn maliciously as [blue]The Capital[/blue] trembles beneath a storm so violent that none dare to leave their homes.

Twelve days later, the rain stops.
The clouds remain, but the [purple]Flame[/purple] has gone out.

The [gold]Spire[/gold] opens its doors once more.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Orobas
epochData.description:
Attracted by the now burning Spire, Orobas’ curiosity was piqued.

“Blight gone!! Why gone! Safe to enter!? Orobas enters!!!”
epochData.descriptionEn:
Attracted by the now burning Spire, Orobas’ curiosity was piqued.

“Blight gone!! Why gone! Safe to enter!? Orobas enters!!!”
epochData.unlockInfo: Play a run with every character to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Play a run with every character to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked Ancient: [aqua]Orobas[/aqua].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked Ancient: [aqua]Orobas[/aqua].

epochData.name: Poisoner
epochData.description:
Another hunt concludes.

Stilling the putrid Heart with a [sine]special-made poison[/sine], the [green]Silent[/green] rappels upwards and outwards and longs to bathe in the comforting moonlight. She leaves the [gold]Spire[/gold] with a prize in hand. A piece of the [purple]Heart[/purple].
epochData.descriptionEn:
Another hunt concludes.

Stilling the putrid Heart with a [sine]special-made poison[/sine], the [green]Silent[/green] rappels upwards and outwards and longs to bathe in the comforting moonlight. She leaves the [gold]Spire[/gold] with a prize in hand. A piece of the [purple]Heart[/purple].
epochData.unlockInfo: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Preon
epochData.description:
A [sine]void of nothingness[/sine].

But then, the world came into existence!
It churned about and molded itself to “That which tells stories.” Along this journey lay a planet named [green]Preon[/green], a mere speck in this universe. They say that a great story about a [gold]Spire[/gold] took place there.
epochData.descriptionEn:
A [sine]void of nothingness[/sine].

But then, the world came into existence!
It churned about and molded itself to “That which tells stories.” Along this journey lay a planet named [green]Preon[/green], a mere speck in this universe. They say that a great story about a [gold]Spire[/gold] took place there.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Resolving Bugs
epochData.description:
[blue]Defect[/blue] and [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fast became friends and exited the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange]; it was sad there.

They return to the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] mid floors and are met with a [jitter]MASSIVE BUG INFESTATION[/jitter]!!
The pair get to work in an attempt to reduce the bugs to a reasonable level.
epochData.descriptionEn:
[blue]Defect[/blue] and [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fast became friends and exited the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange]; it was sad there.

They return to the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] mid floors and are met with a [jitter]MASSIVE BUG INFESTATION[/jitter]!!
The pair get to work in an attempt to reduce the bugs to a reasonable level.
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [blue]Defect[/blue] and [gold]Focus Potion[/gold], [gold]Essence of Darkness[/gold], and [gold]Potion of Capacity[/gold].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [blue]Defect[/blue] and [gold]Focus Potion[/gold], [gold]Essence of Darkness[/gold], and [gold]Potion of Capacity[/gold].

epochData.name: Scribbles
epochData.description:
On this quiet planet, [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to dot the world.

They roam the lands in this time of simple, gleeful violence. Countless ways to kill, to feed, and proliferate are [sine]suggested[/sine]. Colonies, hives, groups, and schools ebb and flow into the nooks and crannies of [orange]Preon[/orange].
epochData.descriptionEn:
On this quiet planet, [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to dot the world.

They roam the lands in this time of simple, gleeful violence. Countless ways to kill, to feed, and proliferate are [sine]suggested[/sine]. Colonies, hives, groups, and schools ebb and flow into the nooks and crannies of [orange]Preon[/orange].
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Seeds
epochData.description:
Enamored by the growth and stability of flora and fauna, the [red]Architect[/red] spends decades researching and refining them... And so, at last, the penultimate creation— [gold]“The Ancient Seeds”[/gold] are complete!

The seeds which turned out to be failures, [purple]“The Mistakes”[/purple], were placed in a heavy coffer and hurled into the ocean’s depths.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Enamored by the growth and stability of flora and fauna, the [red]Architect[/red] spends decades researching and refining them... And so, at last, the penultimate creation— [gold]“The Ancient Seeds”[/gold] are complete!

The seeds which turned out to be failures, [purple]“The Mistakes”[/purple], were placed in a heavy coffer and hurled into the ocean’s depths.
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] three times to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] three times to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked game mode: Custom.
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked game mode: Custom.

epochData.name: Slumber
epochData.description:
Neow excitedly presented the [red]Architect[/red] with a potent [purple]tea[/purple] she had been working on since his prior visit.

[sine]“This... will help... ..you sleep.....”[/sine]
epochData.descriptionEn:
Neow excitedly presented the [red]Architect[/red] with a potent [purple]tea[/purple] she had been working on since his prior visit.

[sine]“This... will help... ..you sleep.....”[/sine]

epochData.name: Snuffed
epochData.description:
It is said that a never ceasing flame atop the [gold]Spire[/gold] burns proudly. Proven by the neighboring clouds glowing a gentle violet through the darkest winter nights.

Then one day, the clouds were normal.
The [purple]flame[/purple] went out.
epochData.descriptionEn:
It is said that a never ceasing flame atop the [gold]Spire[/gold] burns proudly. Proven by the neighboring clouds glowing a gentle violet through the darkest winter nights.

Then one day, the clouds were normal.
The [purple]flame[/purple] went out.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Somewhere
epochData.description: This is a placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...
epochData.descriptionEn: This is a placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...

epochData.name: Soup
epochData.description:
[sine]“Hello, little one...!”[/sine] the massive [orange]Tezcatara[/orange] whispered to the [green]Silent[/green].

“Grow big and strong!” The Ancient speaks in a tender tone and scoots over a bowl of nutritious [sine]soup[/sine].
epochData.descriptionEn:
[sine]“Hello, little one...!”[/sine] the massive [orange]Tezcatara[/orange] whispered to the [green]Silent[/green].

“Grow big and strong!” The Ancient speaks in a tender tone and scoots over a bowl of nutritious [sine]soup[/sine].

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Spireborn
epochData.description:
“We were but meant to survey the preliminary floors...
But it proved nothing like we expected! Such wondrous [green]wildlife[/green], [gold]curious artifacts[/gold], and even [blue]wandering traders[/blue]. From whence have these marvels arrived?

Our team seems intent on hoarding riches but at least my enthusiasm is shared by [orange]Geovan[/orange]. We have fallen [sine][red]madly in love[/red][/sine], and soon shall welcome a [pink]child[/pink] into our lives.”
epochData.descriptionEn:
“We were but meant to survey the preliminary floors...
But it proved nothing like we expected! Such wondrous [green]wildlife[/green], [gold]curious artifacts[/gold], and even [blue]wandering traders[/blue]. From whence have these marvels arrived?

Our team seems intent on hoarding riches but at least my enthusiasm is shared by [orange]Geovan[/orange]. We have fallen [sine][red]madly in love[/red][/sine], and soon shall welcome a [pink]child[/pink] into our lives.”

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] and [gold]Potion of Doom[/gold], [gold]Pot of Ghouls[/gold], and [gold]Bone Brew[/gold].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] and [gold]Potion of Doom[/gold], [gold]Pot of Ghouls[/gold], and [gold]Bone Brew[/gold].

epochData.name: The Architect
epochData.description:
Too many [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to populate [orange]Preon[/orange] and things aren’t simple and fun anymore. The creatures didn’t make sense. The monsters don’t follow logic.
[sine]Maybe[/sine] there needs to be one which can create, destroy, and control this mess? An entity with its own imagination and will?

Let’s [sine]Imagine[/sine] such a being.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Too many [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to populate [orange]Preon[/orange] and things aren’t simple and fun anymore. The creatures didn’t make sense. The monsters don’t follow logic.
[sine]Maybe[/sine] there needs to be one which can create, destroy, and control this mess? An entity with its own imagination and will?

Let’s [sine]Imagine[/sine] such a being.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: The Calm
epochData.description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] stopped consuming.

The ground, dry and brittle- begins to moisten. The clouds around the [gold]Spire[/gold] douse the lands. The sunlight pierces through newly formed cracks in the clouds.

It has been done. Someone had slain the Spire.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] stopped consuming.

The ground, dry and brittle- begins to moisten. The clouds around the [gold]Spire[/gold] douse the lands. The sunlight pierces through newly formed cracks in the clouds.

It has been done. Someone had slain the Spire.

epochData.name: The Daily
epochData.description: A being of immense power exercises his mastery of form and space once a day, shifting the very nature of the [gold]Spire[/gold].
epochData.descriptionEn: A being of immense power exercises his mastery of form and space once a day, shifting the very nature of the [gold]Spire[/gold].
epochData.unlockInfo: Play a single run with all characters and beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Play a single run with all characters and beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked game mode: Daily.
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked game mode: Daily.

epochData.name: The Giant
epochData.description:
Today marks a fantastic discovery!

A benevolent giant has agreed to guide us to the top of the Spire to meet his brother.
We believe this brother of his has the solution to stop the monsters which have been pouring out of the Spire.

This would be the greatest accomplishment of our time!
epochData.descriptionEn:
Today marks a fantastic discovery!

A benevolent giant has agreed to guide us to the top of the Spire to meet his brother.
We believe this brother of his has the solution to stop the monsters which have been pouring out of the Spire.

This would be the greatest accomplishment of our time!
epochData.unlockInfo: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: The Ironclad
epochData.description:
[red]The Ironclad.[/red] A warrior from a faraway land entered the [gold]Spire[/gold].
Driven by pure instinct and accursed blood, he has lost all reason and identity.

All who prevent his ascent shall perish.
epochData.descriptionEn:
[red]The Ironclad.[/red] A warrior from a faraway land entered the [gold]Spire[/gold].
Driven by pure instinct and accursed blood, he has lost all reason and identity.

All who prevent his ascent shall perish.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: The Pact
epochData.description: For centuries, war raged between the [red]Ironclads[/red] and the [blue]Valleyguard[/blue]. Driven by ambition, a young ironclad ventures to the forbidden boundary and bargains with the sacred [jitter]“Demon”[/jitter].
epochData.descriptionEn: For centuries, war raged between the [red]Ironclads[/red] and the [blue]Valleyguard[/blue]. Driven by ambition, a young ironclad ventures to the forbidden boundary and bargains with the sacred [jitter]“Demon”[/jitter].

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [red]Ironclad[/red] and [gold]Blood Potion[/gold], [gold]Soldier's Stew[/gold], and [gold]Ashwater[/gold].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [red]Ironclad[/red] and [gold]Blood Potion[/gold], [gold]Soldier's Stew[/gold], and [gold]Ashwater[/gold].

epochData.name: The Spire
epochData.description:
Its roots no longer able to draw nourishment from [orange]Preon[/orange], the [gold]Ancient Trees[/gold] began to wither and die... the once beautiful forests surrender to the weight of eternity.

Even Neow’s Tree loses its branches and lush foliage. The last tree is no tree at all.
They give it a name.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Its roots no longer able to draw nourishment from [orange]Preon[/orange], the [gold]Ancient Trees[/gold] began to wither and die... the once beautiful forests surrender to the weight of eternity.

Even Neow’s Tree loses its branches and lush foliage. The last tree is no tree at all.
They give it a name.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked event: [blue]Colorful Philosophers[/blue].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked event: [blue]Colorful Philosophers[/blue].

epochData.name: The Twelve
epochData.description:
Who is worthy to enter the exalted Spire?
[blue]The Capital[/blue] gathers the most [purple]brilliant[/purple], [green]formidable[/green], and [red]courageous[/red] from all the lands.
Twelve explorers formed an expedition and advanced inside to make history.

None made it back.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Who is worthy to enter the exalted Spire?
[blue]The Capital[/blue] gathers the most [purple]brilliant[/purple], [green]formidable[/green], and [red]courageous[/red] from all the lands.
Twelve explorers formed an expedition and advanced inside to make history.

None made it back.

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: They Return
epochData.description:
The Ancients emerged from hiding and head to the [gold]Spire[/gold]...

It has been too long since they had received its blessings.
epochData.descriptionEn:
The Ancients emerged from hiding and head to the [gold]Spire[/gold]...

It has been too long since they had received its blessings.

epochData.unlockText: Unlocked event: [blue]Reflections snoitcelfeR[/blue].
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked event: [blue]Reflections snoitcelfeR[/blue].

epochData.name: To Kill
epochData.description:
The [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] faced off against the [red]Architect[/red] and demands the restoration of the [green]Giant[/green], her parents, her humanity. She’s [jitter]blazing with vengeance[/jitter] but is annihilated again and again.

On one of her ascents, she discovers a massive dragon, [gold]Pael[/gold]. Giving off the same gentle presence as the [green]Giant[/green], he speaks...

[thinky_dots]“This will help you get his attention...”[/thinky_dots]
epochData.descriptionEn:
The [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] faced off against the [red]Architect[/red] and demands the restoration of the [green]Giant[/green], her parents, her humanity. She’s [jitter]blazing with vengeance[/jitter] but is annihilated again and again.

On one of her ascents, she discovers a massive dragon, [gold]Pael[/gold]. Giving off the same gentle presence as the [green]Giant[/green], he speaks...

“This will help you get his attention...”

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.

epochData.name: Traitors
epochData.description:
One of the many Ancients, [blue]Neow[/blue], grew jealous of the awe-inspiring will of the [red]Architect[/red].

She confided with a like-minded sibling and together they created a most potent concoction.
[purple]The Blight[/purple].
epochData.descriptionEn:
One of the many Ancients, [blue]Neow[/blue], grew jealous of the awe-inspiring will of the [red]Architect[/red].

She confided with a like-minded sibling and together they created a most potent concoction.
[purple]The Blight[/purple].

epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.

epochData.name: Tricked
epochData.description:
[blue]Neow[/blue] resurrected the defective construct, no simple feat even for an Ancient.

[sine]“Construct... what you.. ..lost....
Your [red]creator[/red]... ..abandoned you.. ...hides..... at the... ..top...”[/sine]
The [blue]Defect[/blue] thanks [blue]Neow[/blue] and heads for the top, seeking answers.

[blue]Neow[/blue] resurrected the defective construct, no simple feat even for an Ancient.

epochData.name: Trophies
epochData.description: Fantastic trophies occupy this forsaken place. All were defeated, one by one. Those marked by the Silent always fall.
epochData.descriptionEn: Fantastic trophies occupy this forsaken place. All were defeated, one by one. Those marked by the Silent always fall.

epochData.name: Underdocks
epochData.description:
Once a source of [blue]clean water[/blue] for all the [gold]Spire[/gold], the [gold]Underdocks[/gold] falls into disrepair.
[red][jitter]Aggressive sea creatures[/jitter][/red] emerged from its depths, making a home in the maze-like passages.
epochData.descriptionEn:
Once a source of [blue]clean water[/blue] for all the [gold]Spire[/gold], the [gold]Underdocks[/gold] falls into disrepair.
[red][jitter]Aggressive sea creatures[/jitter][/red] emerged from its depths, making a home in the maze-like passages.
epochData.unlockInfo: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Unlock by accumulating score.
epochData.unlockText: Unlocked the [blue]Underdocks[/blue], an alternate Act 1.
epochData.unlockTextEn: Unlocked the [blue]Underdocks[/blue], an alternate Act 1.

epochData.name: We Need a Hero!
epochData.description:
Deadly monsters had begun to trickle out of the [gold]Spire[/gold] at an increasing pace ever since the Doors have reopened...

Brave warriors, explorers, and mercenaries have been sent in but few make progress.
Even fewer make it back alive.

The [orange]Regent[/orange] learns of this dismay and takes it upon himself to become the hero that Preon needs!
“I enter!!”
epochData.descriptionEn:
Deadly monsters had begun to trickle out of the [gold]Spire[/gold] at an increasing pace ever since the Doors have reopened...

Brave warriors, explorers, and mercenaries have been sent in but few make progress.
Even fewer make it back alive.

The [orange]Regent[/orange] learns of this dismay and takes it upon himself to become the hero that Preon needs!
“I enter!!”
epochData.unlockInfo: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
epochData.unlockInfoEn: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
